rulings.Case Title: DAVID BRYAN VS. U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE FOR J.P. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Moiton For Judgment On The Pleadings; Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 24, 2012, line 9. DEFENDANT U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Request For Judicial Notice. Hearing required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants 1090 Eddy St. Llc; Adam Komosa Ind. Dba Jason Adams Management Co. And Ralph Dayan And Tom Swierk'S Demurrer To Plaintiffs' First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 24, 2012, line 1. Defendants 1090 Eddy St. Llc, Adam Komosa Individually Dba Jason Adams Management Company, Ralph Dayan And Tom Swierk'S Demurrer To Plaintiffs' First Amended Complaint. Sustain with leave to amend 1) (Demurrer to Class Action) to allege putative class of which named defendants would be adequate representatives for typical claims with premdominantly common issues of law and fact; 2) IIED cause of action to allege supporting facts of outrageous conduct and severe emotional distress; overrule cause of action for breach of covenant of quiet enjoyment. Sufficient per Tooke v. Allen. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants 1090 Eddy St. Llc; Adam Komosa Ind. Dba Jason Adams Management Co. And Ralph Dayan And Tom Swierk'S Motion To Strike Pltfs' First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 24, 2012, line 1. Defendants 1090 Eddy St. Llc; Adam Komosa Individually Dba Jason Adams Management Company, Ralph Dayan And Tom Swierk'S Motion To Strike Plaintiffs' First Amended Complaint. Grant Motion to Strike with leave to amend re class assertions in conformity with ruling in demurrer; grant without leave to amend as to injunctive relief; grant with leave to amend as to punitive damages. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STUART KAUFMAN VS. RECONSTRUCT COMPANY, N.A. et al

rulings.Case Title: STUART KAUFMAN VS. RECONSTRUCT COMPANY, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 24, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANTs RECONSTRUCT COMPANY, N.A., THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON and MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC.'s DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain without leave to amend as to second cause of action, wrongful attempt to sell; sustain with leave to amend as to first cause of action fraud to allege standing, reliance and damages. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SARAH MORTON AKA SARA MORTON, TRUSTEE OF THE VS. SHIELA HINGORANI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 24, 2012, line 10. DEFENDANT SHIELA HINGORANI's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons. Deny motion to quash. Causes of action sufficiently set forth for reasons set forth in oppositon and moving party cites no authority. San Franicsco Rent Ordinance 37.9(a)(9) is not just cause at this state of conversion. = (501/REQ)
